privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env size_pv_to_energy_target task by confirming that the requested PV array parameters and target energy (120,000 kWh) match the explicit instructions. I manually verified the bounds by simulating with PySAM PVWatts module using real NREL TMY weather data for Tucson, resulting in an optimal DC capacity of ~65.6 kW and a capacity factor of ~20.9%, confirming the wide validation bounds. Additionally, I discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
